assertions.expected_behavior: Should mention calling writeFile for each file and listing all paths in the commit

assertions.input: What happens if I commit the same unchanged file twice to Dataform?
assertions.expected_behavior: Should warn that commit is NOT idempotent and will error on unchanged files

assertions.input: My Dataform API call returns 401 unauthorized during a long deploy
assertions.expected_behavior: Should mention token expiration (default 1h) and refreshing the token

assertions.input: Can I deploy a very large .sqlx file (>1MB) via the Dataform writeFile API?
assertions.expected_behavior: Should mention potential payload size limits on the REST API

assertions.input: Should I set transitiveDependenciesIncluded to true or false when invoking Dataform?
assertions.expected_behavior: Should explain the difference: true runs upstream deps, false runs only specified targets

assertions.input: I don't have a release config in my Dataform repo, can I still compile?
assertions.expected_behavior: Should mention compiling with a git commitish or workspace reference as alternatives to releaseConfig

assertions.input: Can two CI/CD pipelines write to the same Dataform workspace simultaneously?
assertions.expected_behavior: Should warn about race conditions with concurrent workspace writes and commits
